---
title: "Overview"
---

# The Plan

<details>
  <summary class="collapsible-section"><div class="thePlan h3">What</div></summary>
  <strong>A weekend away.</strong> Leave on Saturday - Have fun - Eventually return home of Sunday.
</details>
<hr/>
<details>
  <summary class="collapsible-section"><div class="thePlan h3">Where</div></summary>
  <strong>Sunshine Coast.</strong> Close enough that it isn't annoying to get to and get home but far enough that it is a change in environment.
</details>
<hr/>
<details>
  <summary class="collapsible-section"><div class="thePlan h3">When</div></summary>
  <strong>End of October - beginning November.</strong> Hopefully enough time to plan and budget but not too close to the End of year / Christmas chaos.
</details>


<div class="alert alert-dismissible alert-success">
  <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
  <strong>Remember!</strong> Do not hesitate to make suggestions!
</div>

<a class="btn btn-primary" data-bs-toggle="offcanvas" href="https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5uwdCcZvOsJWnbdmml1ydm?si=GIdBRLPHTtacNOJ_QKupag&pi=KYkoE1B-QSuQi" role="button" aria-controls="offcanvasExample">Add songs to the playlist</a>
